---
title: "ssGSEA Analysis Tool"
output: n/a
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

##############################################################################
## ssGSEA analysis + visualization (post-RNA-seq)                            ##
## - Adds PCA biplot with non-overlapping labels via ggrepel                 ##
##############################################################################

##############################################################################
## 0. CONFIGURATION                                                          ##
##############################################################################
expr_file         <- "Sacral24_4ssGSEA.csv"
metadata_file     <- "GRCg7b_metadata_4ssGSEA.csv"
species_name      <- "Gallus gallus"

gmt_file          <- ""
msig_collection   <- "H"
msig_subcollection <- ""

minGSSize         <- 10
maxGSSize         <- 500

ssgsea_alpha      <- 0.25
ssgsea_normalize  <- TRUE

top_variable_heatmap_n <- 30
top_boxplot_n          <- 10
top_dotplot_n          <- 20

run_umap         <- TRUE
umap_n_neighbors <- 8
umap_min_dist    <- 0.2

signature_paths <- c(
  "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB",
  "HALLMARK_IL6_JAK_STAT3_SIGNALING",
  "HALLMARK_COMPLEMENT",
  "HALLMARK_APOPTOSIS"
)

ranked_paths_to_plot <- c("HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE")

drop_hallmark_prefix  <- TRUE
underscores_to_spaces <- TRUE

biplot_top_loadings   <- 15
biplot_scale_arrows   <- TRUE

# NEW: biplot label repel settings
use_ggrepel_for_biplot <- TRUE
biplot_label_size      <- 3
biplot_max_overlaps    <- 50   # increase if many labels still drop

specific_boxplot_paths <- c("HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE")

outdir           <- "ssgsea_output"
install_missing  <- FALSE
set.seed(1234)

##############################################################################
## 1. PACKAGES                                                               ##
##############################################################################
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_pkgs <- c("readr","dplyr","tibble","ggplot2","stringr","tidyr","pheatmap")
bio_pkgs  <- c("GSVA","GSEABase","msigdbr","BiocParallel")

maybe_install <- function(pkgs, bioc = FALSE) {
  for (p in pkgs) {
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE) && isTRUE(install_missing)) {
      if (bioc) BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
      else install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE)
    }
  }
}
maybe_install(cran_pkgs, bioc = FALSE)
maybe_install(bio_pkgs, bioc = TRUE)

if (isTRUE(run_umap) && !requireNamespace("uwot", quietly = TRUE) && isTRUE(install_missing)) {
  install.packages("uwot", dependencies = TRUE)
}

# NEW: ggrepel for biplot labels
if (isTRUE(use_ggrepel_for_biplot) && !requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE) && isTRUE(install_missing)) {
  install.packages("ggrepel", dependencies = TRUE)
}

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(GSVA)
  library(GSEABase)
  library(msigdbr)
  library(BiocParallel)
})
if (isTRUE(use_ggrepel_for_biplot) && requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ggrepel))
}

##############################################################################
## 2. HELPERS                                                                ##
##############################################################################
resolve_path <- function(p) {
  if (is.null(p) || !nzchar(p)) return(p)
  if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  p2 <- file.path("/mnt/data", p)
  if (file.exists(p2)) return(p2)
  return(p)
}

safe_filename <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("^_+|_+$", "", x)
  if (!nzchar(x)) x <- "plot"
  x
}

pretty_pathway <- function(x, drop_hallmark = TRUE, underscores_to_spaces = TRUE) {
  y <- as.character(x)
  if (isTRUE(drop_hallmark)) y <- sub("^HALLMARK[_ ]+", "", y, ignore.case = FALSE)
  if (isTRUE(underscores_to_spaces)) y <- gsub("_+", " ", y)
  y
}

expr_file     <- resolve_path(expr_file)
metadata_file <- resolve_path(metadata_file)
gmt_file      <- resolve_path(gmt_file)

read_matrix <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Expression file not found: ", path)
  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))
  df <- if (ext %in% c("tsv", "txt")) readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) else readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (ncol(df) < 2) stop("Expression file must have at least 2 columns (gene + samples).")
  gene_ids <- df[[1]]
  expr <- df[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  expr_mat <- as.matrix(expr)
  rownames(expr_mat) <- as.character(gene_ids)
  suppressWarnings(storage.mode(expr_mat) <- "numeric")
  if (all(is.na(expr_mat))) stop("Expression matrix could not be parsed as numeric (all NA after coercion).")
  keep_rows <- rowSums(!is.na(expr_mat)) > 0
  expr_mat <- expr_mat[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]
  if (is.null(colnames(expr_mat)) || any(!nzchar(colnames(expr_mat)))) stop("Expression matrix must have sample names as column headers.")
  expr_mat
}

read_metadata <- function(path, sample_col = "sample", group_col = "group") {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))
  meta <- if (ext %in% c("tsv", "txt")) readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) else readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  names(meta) <- tolower(names(meta))
  sample_col <- tolower(sample_col); group_col <- tolower(group_col)
  if (!all(c(sample_col, group_col) %in% names(meta))) stop("Metadata file must include columns: ", sample_col, ", ", group_col)
  meta <- meta %>%
    dplyr::mutate(sample = as.character(.data[[sample_col]]), group = as.character(.data[[group_col]])) %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, group) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(sample), nzchar(sample), !is.na(group), nzchar(group)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(sample, .keep_all = TRUE)
  meta
}

##############################################################################
## 3. LOAD DATA                                                              ##
##############################################################################
expr_mat <- read_matrix(expr_file)

if (any(duplicated(rownames(expr_mat)))) {
  expr_tbl <- as.data.frame(expr_mat) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(row_var = apply(dplyr::select(., -gene), 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gene) %>%
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = row_var, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(-row_var)
  expr_mat <- expr_tbl %>% tibble::column_to_rownames("gene") %>% as.matrix()
}

meta <- read_metadata(metadata_file)
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  if (!all(colnames(expr_mat) %in% meta$sample)) stop("Metadata missing samples: ", paste(setdiff(colnames(expr_mat), meta$sample), collapse = ", "))
  meta <- meta %>% dplyr::slice(match(colnames(expr_mat), sample))
}

##############################################################################
## 4. GENE SETS                                                              ##
##############################################################################
if (nzchar(gmt_file)) {
  if (!file.exists(gmt_file)) stop("GMT file not found: ", gmt_file)
  gmt <- GSEABase::getGmt(gmt_file)
  gene_sets <- GSEABase::geneIds(gmt)
} else {
  msig_species <- msigdbr::msigdbr_species()$species_name
  if (!species_name %in% msig_species) stop("MSigDB does not support species '", species_name, "'. Provide a GMT file.")
  subcoll <- if (nzchar(msig_subcollection)) msig_subcollection else NULL
  msig <- msigdbr::msigdbr(species = species_name, collection = msig_collection, subcollection = subcoll)
  gene_sets <- msig %>%
    dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gs_name), nzchar(gs_name), !is.na(gene_symbol), nzchar(gene_symbol)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gs_name) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(genes = list(unique(gene_symbol)), .groups = "drop")
  gene_sets <- setNames(gene_sets$genes, gene_sets$gs_name)
}

gene_sets <- lapply(gene_sets, intersect, rownames(expr_mat))
sizes <- vapply(gene_sets, length, integer(1))
gene_sets <- gene_sets[sizes >= minGSSize & sizes <= maxGSSize]
if (length(gene_sets) == 0) stop("No gene sets left after filtering. Adjust min/max size or use a GMT file.")

# ---- Export gene list for a specific gene set (post-intersection; used in analysis) ----
target_set <- "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE"

if (!target_set %in% names(gene_sets)) {
  stop("Gene set not found in gene_sets: ", target_set,
       "\nAvailable sets containing 'INFLAM': ",
       paste(grep("INFLAM", names(gene_sets), value = TRUE), collapse = ", "))
}

genes_used <- sort(unique(gene_sets[[target_set]]))

cat("\n", target_set, " genes used (post-intersection): ", length(genes_used), "\n", sep = "")
print(head(genes_used, 25))

write.csv(
  data.frame(gene_symbol = genes_used),
  file = file.path(outdir, paste0(target_set, "_genes_used.csv")),
  row.names = FALSE
)

##############################################################################
## 5. ssGSEA                                                                 ##
##############################################################################
if (!dir.exists(outdir)) dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)

run_ssgsea <- function(expr_mat, gene_sets) {
  if (exists("ssgseaParam", where = asNamespace("GSVA"), inherits = FALSE)) {
    param <- GSVA::ssgseaParam(
      exprData = expr_mat, geneSets = gene_sets,
      minSize = minGSSize, maxSize = maxGSSize,
      alpha = ssgsea_alpha, normalize = ssgsea_normalize,
      checkNA = "auto", use = "everything"
    )
    return(GSVA::gsva(param, verbose = FALSE, BPPARAM = BiocParallel::SerialParam(progressbar = FALSE)))
  }
  kcdf <- if (max(expr_mat, na.rm = TRUE) > 50) "Poisson" else "Gaussian"
  GSVA::gsva(expr_mat, gene_sets, method = "ssgsea", kcdf = kcdf, min.sz = minGSSize, max.sz = maxGSSize, verbose = FALSE)
}

ssgsea_scores <- run_ssgsea(expr_mat, gene_sets)
write.csv(ssgsea_scores, file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_scores.csv"))
saveRDS(ssgsea_scores, file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_scores.rds"))

##############################################################################
## 6. PCA + BIPLOT WITH GGREPEL                                              ##
##############################################################################
pca <- prcomp(t(ssgsea_scores), scale. = TRUE)

# PCA scatter
pca_df <- data.frame(pca$x, sample = rownames(pca$x))
if (!is.null(meta)) pca_df <- dplyr::left_join(pca_df, meta, by = "sample")

p_pca <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = if (!is.null(meta)) group else NULL), size = 3) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  labs(title = "ssGSEA PCA", color = "Group")
ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_pca.pdf"), p_pca, width = 6, height = 5)

make_pca_biplot <- function(pca_obj, meta = NULL, n_arrows = 15, scale_arrows = TRUE) {
  scores <- as.data.frame(pca_obj$x[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
  scores$sample <- rownames(scores)
  if (!is.null(meta)) scores <- dplyr::left_join(scores, meta, by = "sample")

  loads <- as.data.frame(pca_obj$rotation[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
  loads$pathway <- rownames(loads)
  loads$pathway_label <- pretty_pathway(loads$pathway,
                                       drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                       underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)
  loads$mag <- sqrt(loads$PC1^2 + loads$PC2^2)
  loads <- loads %>% dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(mag)) %>% dplyr::slice_head(n = min(n_arrows, nrow(loads)))

  if (isTRUE(scale_arrows)) {
    sx <- max(abs(scores$PC1), na.rm = TRUE)
    sy <- max(abs(scores$PC2), na.rm = TRUE)
    lx <- max(abs(loads$PC1), na.rm = TRUE)
    ly <- max(abs(loads$PC2), na.rm = TRUE)
    mult <- 0.5 * min(sx / ifelse(lx == 0, 1, lx), sy / ifelse(ly == 0, 1, ly))
    loads$PC1s <- loads$PC1 * mult
    loads$PC2s <- loads$PC2 * mult
  } else {
    loads$PC1s <- loads$PC1
    loads$PC2s <- loads$PC2
  }

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = scores,
      aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = if (!is.null(meta)) group else NULL),
      size = 3
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      data = loads,
      aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1s, yend = PC2s),
      arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.18, "cm")),
      linewidth = 0.5,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    labs(title = "PCA biplot (ssGSEA scores)", x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = "Group")

  # Non-overlapping labels (ggrepel), fallback to geom_text if missing
  if (isTRUE(use_ggrepel_for_biplot) && requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
    p <- p + ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = loads,
      aes(x = PC1s, y = PC2s, label = pathway_label),
      size = biplot_label_size,
      max.overlaps = biplot_max_overlaps,
      box.padding = 0.35,
      point.padding = 0.25,
      min.segment.length = 0
    )
  } else {
    p <- p + geom_text(
      data = loads,
      aes(x = PC1s, y = PC2s, label = pathway_label),
      size = biplot_label_size,
      vjust = 1.1,
      hjust = 0.5
    )
  }

  p
}

p_biplot <- make_pca_biplot(pca, meta = meta, n_arrows = biplot_top_loadings, scale_arrows = biplot_scale_arrows)
ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_pca_biplot.pdf"), p_biplot, width = 8, height = 6)

##############################################################################
## 7+. REST OF YOUR PIPELINE                                                 ##
## If you want, I can merge this ggrepel biplot block back into your full    ##
## most recent “everything included” script you’re running.                  ##
##############################################################################

message("Biplot with ggrepel saved to: ", file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_pca_biplot.pdf"))


##############################################################################
## 7. HEATMAP (top variable pathways)                                        ##
##############################################################################
pathway_var <- apply(ssgsea_scores, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top_n <- min(top_variable_heatmap_n, length(pathway_var))
heatmat <- ssgsea_scores[names(sort(pathway_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n], , drop = FALSE]

rownames(heatmat) <- pretty_pathway(rownames(heatmat),
                                   drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                   underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)

annotation_col <- NULL
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  annotation_col <- meta %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, group) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("sample")
}

pdf(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_heatmap_top_variable.pdf"), width = 8, height = 10)
pheatmap::pheatmap(
  heatmat,
  scale = "row",
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  main = "Top variable ssGSEA pathways"
)
dev.off()

##############################################################################
## 8. BOXPLOTS (top variable pathways)                                       ##
##############################################################################
plot_pathway_boxplots <- function(pathways,
                                 filename = NULL,
                                 width = 10, height = 6) {
  if (is.null(meta)) {
    message("Skipping boxplots: metadata (sample/group) is required.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  pathways <- unique(as.character(pathways))
  pathways_present <- intersect(pathways, rownames(ssgsea_scores))
  if (length(pathways_present) == 0) {
    message("No requested pathways found in ssgsea_scores. (Check names exactly.)")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  df <- as.data.frame(ssgsea_scores[pathways_present, , drop = FALSE]) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      pathway_label = pretty_pathway(pathway,
                                     drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                     underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)
    ) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-c(pathway, pathway_label), names_to = "sample", values_to = "score") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(meta, by = "sample")

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = group, y = score, fill = group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ pathway_label, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(title = "Selected ssGSEA pathways", x = "Group", y = "ssGSEA score")

  if (!is.null(filename)) {
    ggsave(file.path(outdir, filename), p, width = width, height = height)
  }
  return(p)
}

# Existing "top variable" boxplots
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  top_paths <- names(sort(pathway_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:min(top_boxplot_n, length(pathway_var))]
  plot_pathway_boxplots(top_paths,
                        filename = "ssgsea_boxplots_top_variable.pdf",
                        width = 10, height = 8)
}

# NEW: Specific pathways boxplots (user-editable list)
if (length(specific_boxplot_paths) > 0) {
  plot_pathway_boxplots(specific_boxplot_paths,
                        filename = "ssgsea_boxplots_specific_pathways.pdf",
                        width = 10, height = 6)
}

##############################################################################
## 9. SAMPLE–SAMPLE CORRELATION HEATMAP (QC / outliers)                      ##
##############################################################################
sample_cor <- cor(ssgsea_scores, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
ann <- NULL
if (!is.null(meta)) ann <- meta %>% dplyr::select(sample, group) %>% tibble::column_to_rownames("sample")

pdf(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_sample_correlation_heatmap.pdf"), width = 8, height = 7)
pheatmap::pheatmap(
  sample_cor,
  annotation_col = ann,
  annotation_row = ann,
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  main = "Sample–sample correlation (ssGSEA scores)"
)
dev.off()

##############################################################################
## 10. PATHWAY–PATHWAY CORRELATION HEATMAP (modules / redundancy)            ##
##############################################################################
path_cor <- cor(t(ssgsea_scores), use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")

pdf(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_pathway_correlation_heatmap.pdf"), width = 10, height = 9)
pheatmap::pheatmap(
  path_cor,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  main = "Pathway–pathway correlation (ssGSEA scores)"
)
dev.off()

##############################################################################
## 11. UMAP (optional; often cleaner than PCA)                               ##
##############################################################################
if (isTRUE(run_umap)) {
  if (!requireNamespace("uwot", quietly = TRUE)) {
    message("Package 'uwot' not installed; skipping UMAP.")
  } else {
    um <- uwot::umap(
      t(ssgsea_scores),
      n_neighbors = umap_n_neighbors,
      min_dist    = umap_min_dist,
      metric      = "euclidean"
    )
    um_df <- data.frame(UMAP1 = um[, 1], UMAP2 = um[, 2], sample = colnames(ssgsea_scores))
    if (!is.null(meta)) um_df <- dplyr::left_join(um_df, meta, by = "sample")

    p_umap <- ggplot(um_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = if (!is.null(meta)) group else NULL), size = 3) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
      labs(title = "UMAP of samples (ssGSEA scores)", color = "Group")

    ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_umap.pdf"), p_umap, width = 6, height = 5)
  }
}

##############################################################################
## 12. DIFFERENTIAL ssGSEA (2-group volcano + table)                         ##
##############################################################################
if (!is.null(meta) && length(unique(meta$group)) == 2) {
  grp <- meta$group
  lev <- unique(grp)
  g1 <- lev[1]
  g2 <- lev[2]

  stats_df <- apply(ssgsea_scores, 1, function(x) {
    x1 <- x[grp == g1]
    x2 <- x[grp == g2]
    tt <- try(stats::t.test(x2, x1), silent = TRUE)
    p <- if (inherits(tt, "try-error")) NA_real_ else tt$p.value
    diff <- mean(x2, na.rm = TRUE) - mean(x1, na.rm = TRUE)
    c(diff = diff, p = p)
  }) %>% t() %>% as.data.frame()

  stats_df$pathway <- rownames(stats_df)
  stats_df$padj <- p.adjust(stats_df$p, method = "BH")
  stats_df$neglog10_padj <- -log10(stats_df$padj)
  stats_df$pathway_label <- pretty_pathway(stats_df$pathway,
                                          drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                          underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)

  p_volc <- ggplot(stats_df, aes(x = diff, y = neglog10_padj)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Differential ssGSEA: ", g2, " vs ", g1),
      x = "Mean score difference",
      y = "-log10(FDR)"
    )

  ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_volcano.pdf"), p_volc, width = 7, height = 5)

  stats_df <- stats_df %>% dplyr::arrange(padj)
  write.csv(stats_df, file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_differential_stats.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
} else {
  message("Skipping differential/volcano outputs (requires exactly 2 groups in metadata).")
}

##############################################################################
## 13. TOP PATHWAYS BY GROUP DOTPLOT (mean ± SE)                             ##
##############################################################################
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  top_paths <- names(sort(pathway_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:min(top_dotplot_n, length(pathway_var))]

  summ_df <- as.data.frame(ssgsea_scores[top_paths, , drop = FALSE]) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      pathway_label = pretty_pathway(pathway,
                                     drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                     underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)
    ) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-c(pathway, pathway_label), names_to = "sample", values_to = "score") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(meta, by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(group, pathway_label) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      mean = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
      se   = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(score))),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  p_dot <- ggplot(summ_df, aes(x = mean, y = reorder(pathway_label, mean), color = group)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = mean - se, xmax = mean + se), height = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ group, scales = "free_x") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    labs(title = "Top pathways by group (mean ± SE)", x = "ssGSEA score", y = NULL)

  ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_top_pathways_by_group_dotplot.pdf"), p_dot, width = 10, height = 7)
}

##############################################################################
## 14. CURATED SIGNATURE HEATMAP                                             ##
##############################################################################
sig_present <- intersect(signature_paths, rownames(ssgsea_scores))
if (length(sig_present) >= 2) {
  sig_mat <- ssgsea_scores[sig_present, , drop = FALSE]
  rownames(sig_mat) <- pretty_pathway(rownames(sig_mat),
                                      drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                      underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)

  ann2 <- NULL
  if (!is.null(meta)) ann2 <- meta %>% dplyr::select(sample, group) %>% tibble::column_to_rownames("sample")

  pdf(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_signature_heatmap.pdf"),
      width = 7, height = 0.35 * length(sig_present) + 3)
  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    sig_mat,
    scale = "row",
    annotation_col = ann2,
    main = "Curated signature pathways"
  )
  dev.off()
} else {
  message("Signature pathways not found (or too few present) in current gene set universe.")
}

##############################################################################
## 15. RANKED PATHWAY PLOTS (per pathway; presentation-friendly)             ##
##############################################################################
plot_ranked_pathway <- function(path_name) {
  if (!path_name %in% rownames(ssgsea_scores)) {
    message("Ranked plot skipped; pathway not found: ", path_name)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  df <- data.frame(
    sample = colnames(ssgsea_scores),
    score  = as.numeric(ssgsea_scores[path_name, colnames(ssgsea_scores)])
  )
  if (!is.null(meta)) df <- dplyr::left_join(df, meta, by = "sample")

  if (!is.null(meta)) {
    df <- df %>% dplyr::arrange(group, score)
  } else {
    df <- df %>% dplyr::arrange(score)
  }
  df$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df))

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(rank, score)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(aes(color = if (!is.null(meta)) group else NULL), size = 2) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Ranked ssGSEA scores: ",
                     pretty_pathway(path_name,
                                    drop_hallmark = drop_hallmark_prefix,
                                    underscores_to_spaces = underscores_to_spaces)),
      x = "Samples (sorted)",
      y = "ssGSEA score",
      color = "Group"
    )

  fn <- paste0("ssgsea_ranked_", safe_filename(path_name), ".pdf")
  ggsave(file.path(outdir, fn), p, width = 8, height = 4.5)
  invisible(NULL)
}

if (length(ranked_paths_to_plot) > 0) {
  for (p in ranked_paths_to_plot) plot_ranked_pathway(p)
}

##############################################################################
## 16. SESSION INFO                                                          ##
##############################################################################
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt"))
message("ssGSEA analysis complete. Outputs in: ", normalizePath(outdir))


```
